ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gas_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas sample */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gas sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gas sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the gas sample was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the gas sample in Kelvin */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the gas sample in Pascals */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (lab experiment, field measurement, simulation) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who collected the sample */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference or identifier for the source of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas composition */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas sample the composition belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the composition measurement */,
  "pvc" REAL /* Partial vapor content (PVC) of the gas sample */,
  "o2" REAL /* Concentration of O2 in the gas sample */,
  "co2" REAL /* Concentration of CO2 in the gas sample */,
  "h2o" REAL /* Concentration of H2O in the gas sample */,
  "co" REAL /* Concentration of CO in the gas sample */,
  "s" REAL /* Concentration of S in the gas sample */,
  "hcl" REAL /* Concentration of HCL in the gas sample */,
  "n2" REAL /* Concentration of N2 in the gas sample */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for measuring the gas composition */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_compositions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES gas_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gas species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gas species */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the gas species */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the gas species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas composition being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gas composition */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gas composition was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES gas_compositions ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_composition_species" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas composition */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_sample_units" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas sample */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "unit_id")
)
